content.summary: Connecting TOPs with different resolutions without explicit resolution handling causes unexpected scaling, blurring, or UV seam artifacts. Always match resolutions or use Resolution/Fit TOPs.
warnings: This is especially problematic in feedback chains where the mismatch compounds over time

payload.cause: TouchDesigner auto-scales inputs to match the first input's resolution. When a 1080p TOP feeds into a 512x512 TOP, the downscale introduces blur. In feedback loops, this creates progressive quality loss.
payload.fix: Insert a Resolution TOP or Fit TOP between mismatched operators. Or set all TOPs in the chain to the same resolution via Common > Resolution parameter.
payload.symptom: Output looks blurry, has unexpected scaling, or shows UV seam lines at edges. Feedback loops progressively lose detail.
